sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35160" key="e)/ndetos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔνδετος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n35160.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bound to, entangled in</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πάγαις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.372</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
